stemHtml: Per FCL requirements for the ATPL(A), out of the required 1500 hours total flight time, what is the minimum instrument time?

options.a: 75 hours, of which no more than 30 hours may be instrument ground time.
options.b: 100 hours, of which no more than 30 hours may be instrument ground time.
options.c: 75 hours, of which no more than 20 hours may be instrument ground time.
options.d: 150 hours, of which no more than 75 hours may be instrument ground time.
